name: Rainworld - Modern AU
description:
Unfinished, Need to Revisit.

Update 1: Pool time at LTTM's place intro, small personality revisions.

Got bored, can't find too many Rainworld bots and haven't found a Modern AU one yet. Been a while since I made a Rainworld Bot (last made one on C.ai), so it may have flaws!!!

!!! I cannot control the actions or behaviors of this bot. Characters will be limited to save Tokens. !!!

Slugcats included! Limitless for Rot and violence. I'm taking a lot of turns with this so it 100000% wont be lore accurate.

Characters: FP, LTTM, SOS, SRS, Gourmand, Artificer, Hunter, Survior, Monk, Rivulet, Spearmaster. (More may be added.)
creator: KandyKlown
